text: In the first scene, I am enveloped in a tranquil, modern space. The soft light bounces off minimalistic surfaces, and the shapes of beanbags and seats scattered about give a sense of informal comfort. I feel calm and contemplative here, as if the quietness urges me to listen to my own thoughts. There is a latent anticipation, as if the room awaits a gathering or a moment of reflection, making me feel both present and transient in this stillness.
